headline: Why Are TransDigm (TDG) Shares Soaring Today
summary: Shares of aerospace and defense company TransDigm (NYSE:TDG) jumped 5.4% in the afternoon session after it released preliminary second-quarter results showing impressive financial strength.

raw.headline: Why Are TransDigm (TDG) Shares Soaring Today
raw.summary: Shares of aerospace and defense company TransDigm (NYSE:TDG) jumped 5.4% in the afternoon session after it released preliminary second-quarter results showing impressive financial strength.

headline: TransDigm Stock Surges On Preliminary Results, Acquisition Funding Plans
summary: Defense contractor TransDigm released preliminary Q2 results ahead of expectations Tuesday, plans to raise funds for Stellant buyout.

headline: 1 Profitable Stock to Own for Decades and 2 That Underwhelm
summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies - as Jeff Bezos said, "Your margin is my opportunity".

raw.headline: 1 Profitable Stock to Own for Decades and 2 That Underwhelm
raw.summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies - as Jeff Bezos said, "Your margin is my opportunity".
